hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"lean-ctx MANDATORY (project rule): use ctx_shell instead of native Bash. ctx_shell compresses output (95+ patterns) and avoids context/token blowups. Only use native Bash for things ctx_shell genuinely cannot do."}}'
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"lean-ctx MANDATORY: use ctx_search instead of native Grep — same matches, far less token output."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"lean-ctx MANDATORY: use ctx_read instead of native Read for big files — ctx_read caches and compresses heavily (re-reads ~13 tok). Native Read is OK only right before an Edit that needs literal full content."}}'
